text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here, and with the Kikuka<n>Sho
approaching, we have our work<n>cut out for us. As
the bus sets off for<n>summer camp, we seem to be
travelling in an auspicious direction.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru delights in her<n>good
fortune—until the bus overshoots<n>good fortune and
heads toward<n>misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Expecting all sorts of hardships at<n>camp,
Matikanefukukitaru falls into<n>despair.
